Our Companies

  • Spotlights
  • All

Filters

Klarna

Klarna is a payment solution simplifying the purchasing process.

NVIDIA

NVIDIA is a pioneer in the art and science of visual computing.

reddit

Reddit is the internet’s leading source of interest-based content.

Apple

Apple transforms how humans interact with technologies with products like the iPhone, iPod, iPad, Mac and Watch.

YouTube

YouTube, now part of Google, is the world's leading video-sharing service.

Instacart

Instacart facilitates instant grocery delivery from local stores.

DoorDash

DoorDash is an on-demand delivery service.

Airbnb

Airbnb connects people around the world with unique homes and unforgettable experiences.

Linear

Linear builds issue tracking tools for developers.

PayPal

PayPal is the digital payment solution behind the digital wallet.

Block

Block is Square, Cash App, Spiral, TIDAL, TBD, and other foundational teams.

Snowflake

Snowflake is a data warehouse platform built for the cloud.

SpaceX

SpaceX designs, manufactures and launches rockets and spacecraft.

Stripe

Stripe is building an economic infrastructure for the internet.

Google

Google organizes the world's information.

Nubank

Nubank provides next-generation mobile banking and financial services to the Latin American market.

Vanta

Vanta automates and simplifies security and compliance.

Retool

Retool is the fastest way to build internal applications.

WhatsApp

WhatsApp, now part of Facebook, is an end-to-end encrypted mobile messenger app.

Cisco

Cisco makes networking, security and collaboration products for enterprise companies.

HubSpot

HubSpot builds all-in-one marketing software.
